title: depressed blubberloons (ghast)
description: ghast texture update that makes these depressed blubberloons look even more depressed, artificial, and comical
body:
these depresed nether blubber balloons need a texture update so i gave them one its a pixel consistant texture update for the "little" bois

what i did:


<details>
<summary>click to ruin surprise</summary>

i made the gills look more damaged

i made the gills look more heated

i made the skin have stiched on patches to make it look more artifical

a made him more deppresed

i added a funky little warning sticker on the back

when shooting he opens his mouth like a koi fish

when shooting, within his mouth you can see a litle bit of soul energy

gave the ghast tear a soul face

made the ghast tear look more like the shape of a soul

creddit to:konci (for inspireation from her tears and cheers pack)

</details>

my first project (plz like)
